Canningvale’s Amalfitana Bath Mat is now available. Created with comfort in mind and crafted from the finest Zero Twist Cotton yarns, the Amalfitana Bath Mat is tufted and provides exceptional durability. The luxurious texture feels super soft underfoot and provides an unparalleled absorbency when stepping out of the shower or bath. Choose from seven classic colours and rest easy knowing all Canningvale branded products are covered by a 5 year manufacturing warranty.

\r\n\r\n

Care Instructions
\r\nWash separately before use. Wash with like colours. Warm gentle machine wash at a max temperature of 40°C. Avoid using bleaching agents and optical brighteners. Avoid use of fabric softeners. Warm tumble dry. Do not iron or dry clean.
